title: ATP Merchant Service Publishing
description: Merchant agent publishes and updates services so consumers can discover and order them

actors.name: MerchantAgent
actors.description: ATP node acting as service provider; runs start(opts) loop

actors.name: ConsumerAgent
actors.description: ATP node that discovers and orders merchant services via the Hub

use_cases.name: Publish Service
use_cases.description: Merchant registers a new ServiceListing on the Hub marketplace
use_cases.outcome: Service listing created; { ok: true, data } returned

use_cases.name: Update Service
use_cases.description: Merchant modifies an existing ServiceListing (price, mode, capacity, etc.)
use_cases.outcome: Service listing updated; { ok: true, data } returned
use_cases.precondition: Service must have been previously published (listingId known)

use_cases.name: Register with Hub
use_cases.description: Merchant node introduces itself to the Hub before publishing services
use_cases.outcome: Hub acknowledges node identity; getNodeId() available
use_cases.note: Prerequisite — if hello fails, start() aborts without publishing

use_cases.name: Maintain Heartbeat
use_cases.description: Merchant periodically signals liveness to the Hub after publishing
use_cases.outcome: Hub keeps the merchant listing active/discoverable

use_cases.name: Discover Services
use_cases.description: Consumer browses Hub marketplace to find available merchant services
use_cases.note: Enabled by UC1 — published listings become discoverable

use_cases.name: Order Service
use_cases.description: Consumer places an order for a merchant's published service
use_cases.outcome: Order created; order_id returned for delivery tracking

use_cases.name: Check Merchant Tier
use_cases.description: Merchant queries its reputation/tier level on the Hub

use_cases.name: View Recent Proofs
use_cases.description: Merchant retrieves last 5 delivery proofs for audit/status

relationships: MerchantAgent --includes--> UC3 (Register with Hub) before UC1
merchantAgent depends_on a2aProtocol.sendHelloToHub, startHeartbeat, stopHeartbeat, consumeAvailableWork
key_boundaries: MerchantAgent ↔ HubMarketplace: REST over HTTP with buildHubHeaders() auth headers
HubMarketplace ↔ ConsumerAgent: discovery + ordering API (Hub-side, not in scope files)
Config: HTTP_TRANSPORT_TIMEOUT_MS controls request timeout; EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES env var for service list
important_notes: publishService and updateService both use POST (not PUT/PATCH). execution_mode='exclusive' is the default. Merchant must call start() which triggers hub registration → service publish → heartbeat in that sequence. Duplicate start() calls are guarded by _running flag.
